user.title: Add Tuya PSK Bridge
user.description: Set up the Tuya PSK Bridge integration to manage your Tuya device configurations.

device.title: Add Device
device.description: Enter the device details from the Tuya developer portal.

local_key.title: Enter Local Key
local_key.description: Enter the local key for device "{device_name}". This is found in the Tuya IoT Platform device details.

mappings.title: Configure DPS Mappings
mappings.description: Configure which Tuya DPS (data point) maps to a Home Assistant entity.

add_more.title: Add More Devices
add_more.description: You have added {devices} device(s) so far. Would you like to add another?

error.invalid_device_id: Device ID must be a 20-character hex string (0-9, a-f).
error.empty_local_key: Local key must not be empty.

abort.reconfigure_via_config_flow: Reconfiguration via options is not yet available. Remove and re-add the integration to change devices.
Reconfiguration via options is not yet available. Remove and re-add the integration to change devices.
